":"0xf10e0ba062ef86595c0faf2e3d982a6eff6ce9df6aef40b7c53597fb14fcb4fa","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6f2a1e1e77eabd9028aed976da8b262d0f00845fe66e551d1c91c0bf653fa5a4","dweb:/ipfs/QmXoE3GH6nwWnho7tBgskNFqdMmUTskZHrBZBs4xYouHQJ"]}},"version":1}

params.timelockController: Address of the TimelockController that owns this treasury.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

releaseERC20(address,address,uint256).notice: Release ERC-20 tokens to a recipient.

releaseETH(address,uint256).notice: Release ETH to a recipient. Called by TimelockController after governance.
